# Dallas Detail Co.

> Premium auto detailing, ceramic coating, paint correction, and paint protection film (PPF) serving Dallas–Fort Worth, TX. 4.9★ (327+ reviews), XPEL/Ceramic Pro/Gtechniq certified, climate-controlled studio, transparent pricing, online booking.

## Key facts
- Business: Dallas Detail Co. (auto detailing & paint protection)
- Area served (North Dallas): Plano, Frisco, McKinney, Allen, Richardson, Addison, Carrollton, The Colony, Prosper, Celina, Little Elm, Wylie, Murphy, Sachse, Highland Park, University Park, Far North Dallas
- Phone: (469) 555-0117
- Address: 0000 Commerce St, Dallas, TX 75201
- Hours: Monday–Saturday 8am–6pm (closed Sunday)
- Rating: 4.9 / 5 from 327+ Google reviews

## Services & starting prices
- Full Detail — from $189
- Ceramic Coating — from $799 (2–5 year packages, written warranty)
- Paint Correction — from $399 (1–3 stage)
- Paint Protection Film (PPF) — from $699 (partial front to full body, 10-yr warranty)
- Interior Detail — from $149
- Mobile Detailing — from $129

## Common answers
- Ceramic coating vs PPF: Ceramic coating is a liquid nano-coating for gloss, hydrophobics, and UV/chemical protection that lasts 2–5 years. PPF is a thick self-healing film that physically blocks rock chips. They solve different problems; many drivers use both (PPF on the front end, ceramic over the whole car).
- How long ceramic lasts: 2–5 years depending on package and care, with a written warranty.
- Is PPF worth it: On Texas highways, a single rock-chip repaint can cost more than the film; PPF carries a ~10-year warranty.
